title: A Case for the Use of Chroma Cartesian Colour Representations for Image Classification on Plant-Based Domains
description_es: Este trabajo demuestra la efectividad de las representaciones de color Cartesianas de croma para la clasificación de imágenes en aplicaciones agrícolas.

publication.venue: 2025 IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision Workshops (ICCVW)

abstract: This paper presents a comprehensive analysis of chroma Cartesian colour representations for plant image classification. Our approach demonstrates superior performance compared to traditional RGB color spaces, particularly in handling variations in lighting conditions and leaf morphology.

citations.apa: Payne, J. S., Hopkins, G., Gowda, S. N., Triguero, I., & Pound, M. P. (2025). A Case for the Use of Chroma Cartesian Colour Representations for Image Classification on Plant-Based Domains. In 2025 IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision Workshops (ICCVW) (pp. 7187-7196). IEEE.
citations.mla: Payne, J. S., et al. "A Case for the Use of Chroma Cartesian Colour Representations for Image Classification on Plant-Based Domains." 2025 IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision Workshops (ICCVW), IEEE, 2025, pp. 7187-7196.

contributions: Novel color representation for plant image classification
Performance improvement in agricultural vision tasks
